meta.purpose: Showcase landing page for a fictional business: 'The Academy of Phone Pranks' run by Loki, the Norse trickster god. Dark-mischievous vibe: deep black + dark green base, gold + electric-green accents. Display-only site (no backend).
meta.tone: Cheeky, mischievous, mock-academic. Copy reads like a serious institution teaching something completely ridiculous.
meta.motion_stack: GSAP + ScrollTrigger (gsap-scroll-reveal skill). CSS keyframes for ring/wiggle micro-animations.
meta.performance_note: Playful but smooth on mobile/120Hz. prefers-reduced-motion fallbacks required.
meta.icons: pixelarticons (retro 8-bit SVG), converted to JSX components with currentColor.

brand.name: The Academy of Phone Pranks
brand.tagline: The only degree your parents will regret paying for.
brand.principal: Under the management of Loki, God of Mischief

hero.badge: Dean: Loki, God of Mischief · Class of '27
hero.headline: Welcome to the Academy of Phone Pranks
hero.subhead: The world's leading (and only) institution for the fine art of the prank call. A faculty of exactly one god, and the highest laugh rates in all Nine Realms.

whatWeDo.title: What You'll Learn
whatWeDo.subtitle: Four pillars of quality telephone deception.

items.title: The Art of the Prank Call
items.body: From the first dial to the perfect hang-up — every call is a performance, and every busy tone is a standing ovation.

items.title: Prank Scriptwriting
items.body: Scenarios so good, even the victims retell them at family dinners. Proudly.

items.title: Voices & Characters
items.body: City hall clerk, uncle from abroad, customer-service robot. All in one throat, without cracking once.

items.title: Divine Composure
items.body: Not laughing mid-call. The hardest course we offer. Most dropouts fail right here.

divider.title: Intro to Pranks
marquee: PRANK-101 · Intro to Pranks · Enrollment now open
No parking on campus. No campus.
Next lecture: how to answer your own phone call
Tonight's homework: just call someone. Anyone.
The academy library is closed. Forever. Cope.

curriculum.title: The Curriculum
curriculum.subtitle: Four required courses. Zero electives. We don't choose you — you choose chaos.

courses.title: Intro to Phone Pranks
courses.body: Fundamentals of deceptive dialing: breathing, timing, and why you never, ever call from your own number.

courses.title: Advanced Voices & Characters
courses.body: Seven accents, four age groups, and one grandmother character nobody has the heart to hang up on.

courses.title: Masterpiece Scripts
courses.body: From "your pizza is on the way" to "you've won a cruise to Asgard" — writing scenarios that go down in history.

courses.title: Applied Chaos Seminar
courses.body: The capstone project: a multi-stage prank personally supervised by Loki. Survive it, and you're certified.

certification.title: Certified Trickster Diploma™
certification.body: Graduates receive a gold-plated diploma (the gold is fake, like most of our promises) and full membership in the National Guild of Impersonators.

stats.label: Of graduates remain unidentified to this day

instructor.title: Your Instructor
instructor.name: Loki, God of Mischief
instructor.role: Dean, senior lecturer, and the entire faculty
bio: A thousand years of experience in impersonation, deception and inter-realm scheming. Once fooled Thor twice with the exact same trick.
Ever since he discovered the telephone, no number is safe. Teaches out of a deep, genuine love of chaos — and expects nothing less from his students.

facts.label: Email
facts.value: Only answers messages that open with "Your Wickedness"

testimonials.title: Graduates (and Victims) Approve
testimonials.subtitle: All testimonials are real. Trust us. We're a prank academy.

items.quote: I enrolled by accident after getting a prank call from the academy itself. Best trick I've ever seen. Five stars.
items.name: Thor

items.quote: Since taking the course I don't answer any calls. Not from work. Not from mom. Thank you? I think?
items.name: A Satisfied Victim

items.quote: My son graduated with honors. I now live in constant fear, but I'm proud. So very proud.
items.name: A Graduate's Mom

afterCurriculum.line: Ready to join the Class of '27?

afterTestimonials.line: Want to be the next testimonial?

cta.label: Enroll Before We Change Our Minds

enroll.title: The phone is ringing. Answer it.
enroll.subtitle: Enrollment closes the moment we get bored. That happens fast.

cta.label: Master the Art of the Prank Call

footer.tagline: The Academy of Phone Pranks · All rights reserved (we stole those too)

copy_voice_rules.address: Speak directly to the visitor ('you', 'your') — like an institution addressing its incoming class.
